slides.title: Train for *width*
slides.body: Pulldowns and pull-ups build the V.

slides.title: Feel the *lats*
slides.body: Pull with your elbows, not your arms.

slides.title: Add *rows*
slides.body: Rows build the thickness pulldowns miss.

slides.title: Full *stretch*
slides.body: Let the lats stretch all the way at the top.

slides.title: Back takes *volume*
slides.body: 10+ hard sets a week to grow.

slides.title: Build the *back*.
slides.body: Vibe Health keeps your training and protein on track.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store
